member.name: T:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.Core.RedisLuaRateLimiter
member.summary: Performs atomic rate limit evaluation against Redis using a Lua script. Implements a sliding window algorithm to ensure accurate, race-condition-free request counting. Utilizes the internal Redis clock to eliminate distributed clock drift across horizontally scaled API nodes.

member.name: F:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.Core.RedisLuaRateLimiter.SlidingWindowLuaScript
member.summary:
The Lua script implementing a sliding window rate limiter.
KEYS[1] = the rate limit key for this client ARGV[1] = window size in milliseconds ARGV[2] = permit limit (max requests allowed in window) ARGV[3] = unique request identifier (random string/number, for sorted set member)
Note: The current timestamp is generated internally by Redis using the TIME command to ensure consistency across distributed nodes.
Returns: { allowed (0|1), remaining, retryAfterMs }

member.name: M:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.Core.RedisLuaRateLimiter.EvaluateAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Evaluates whether the specified client is within their rate limit.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.Core.RateLimitResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a rate limit evaluation.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.Core.RateLimitResult.IsAllowed
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the request is allowed.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.Core.RateLimitResult.Remaining
member.summary: Gets the number of remaining requests in the current window.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.Core.RateLimitResult.RetryAfter
member.summary: Gets the duration the client should wait before retrying. Only meaningful when is false.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.Extensions.RateLimiterApplicationBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for adding the Redis rate limiting middleware to the ASP.NET Core request pipeline.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.Extensions.RateLimiterApplicationBuilderExtensions.UseRedisRateLimiting(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds the Redis rate limiting middleware to the application's request pipeline.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.Extensions.RateLimiterServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering Redis rate limiting services in the DI container.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.Extensions.RateLimiterServiceCollectionExtensions.AddRedisRateLimiting(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.Action{AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.RateLimiterOptions})
member.summary: Adds Redis-backed rate limiting services to the specified .
member.param: The service collection to add services to.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.Extensions.RateLimiterServiceCollectionExtensions.AddRedisRateLimiting(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,StackExchange.Redis.IConnectionMultiplexer,System.Action{AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.RateLimiterOptions})
member.summary: Adds Redis-backed rate limiting services using an existing instance.
member.param: The service collection to add services to.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.Extensions.RateLimitingMiddleware
member.summary: ASP.NET Core middleware that enforces Redis-backed rate limiting on incoming HTTP requests.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.RateLimiterOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for the Redis rate limiting middleware.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.RateLimiterOptions.PermitLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of requests permitted within the . Defaults to 100.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.RateLimiterOptions.Window
member.summary: Gets or sets the time window for rate limiting. Defaults to 1 minute.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.RateLimiterOptions.ClientIdExtractor
member.summary: Gets or sets the function used to extract a unique client identifier from the incoming HTTP request. Defaults to extracting the client's true IP address, respecting X-Forwarded-For headers from proxies.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.RateLimiterOptions.RedisKeyPrefix
member.summary: Gets or sets the Redis key prefix used for rate limit counters. Defaults to "rl:".

member.name: P:AspNetCore.RedisRateLimiter.RateLimiterOptions.RateLimitExceededMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the response message returned when a client exceeds the rate limit. Defaults to a standard JSON error payload.
